---
description: Research and propose both Place-Based Rental Market production payloads for review
---

Follow [notes/place-based-rental-market-research.md](../../notes/place-based-rental-market-research.md) exactly.

Research all four market/segment units and all nine categories with current online retrievals. Preserve source clocks, geography, population, method, access, rights, limitations, and failed-attempt consequences. Never use fixture values or search snippets as evidence, multiply independent marginals, substitute broad values into luxury observations, or invent a prior.

Write only:

- `palm-springs-rental-market.payload.json`
- `ocean-shores-rental-market.payload.json`

Refuse dirty payload collisions. Restore only invalid bytes written by this invocation. Validate both envelopes and produce the four-unit receipt ending `UNCOMMITTED FOR REVIEW`.

Do not edit config, formulas, modules, routes, tests, fixtures, validators, registries, docs indexes, Market Brief files, workflow artifacts, package/source-lock files, or framework-managed files. Do not stage, commit, push, deploy, register, or auto-publish.
